items.title: Comments appears before Attachments
items.precondition: Signed in as a super admin with a Project Board task available.
items.expected: Tabs read Details, Comments, Attachments; Details is selected by default and both counts show only completed records.
items.evidence: User-authorized waiver on 2026-07-16; item not run.
items.notes: Browser acceptance was skipped for the requested direct dev/dave merge.
items.waiver: The user explicitly waived testing and requested a direct merge to dev/dave. This item was not run and is not claimed as a pass.

items.title: Comments shows one chronological conversation
items.precondition: The selected task has at least two comments and one attachment with different timestamps.
steps: Read the conversation from top to bottom.
Edit one owned comment and confirm mention and markdown rendering still work.
items.expected: Real comments and real task attachments appear in stable oldest-to-newest order; comment edit, delete, mentions, markdown safety, and the comment-only count remain intact.
items.evidence: User-authorized waiver on 2026-07-16; item not run.
items.notes: Browser acceptance was skipped for the requested direct dev/dave merge.
items.waiver: The user explicitly waived testing and requested a direct merge to dev/dave. This item was not run and is not claimed as a pass.

items.title: Comments upload is tracked in both tabs
items.precondition: Comments is selected and a small image plus a non-image file are available.
steps: Drop the image onto the Comments drop target.
While it uploads, switch between Comments and Attachments.
Use the Comments file picker to attach the non-image file.
Wait for both uploads to finish.
items.expected: Each upload creates one shared pending row with progress in both tabs, then becomes one completed attachment below the latest persisted conversation item and increments only the attachment count.
items.evidence: User-authorized waiver on 2026-07-16; item not run.
items.notes: Browser acceptance was skipped for the requested direct dev/dave merge.
items.waiver: The user explicitly waived testing and requested a direct merge to dev/dave. This item was not run and is not claimed as a pass.

items.title: Attachments upload is appended to Comments
items.precondition: Attachments is selected and a file is available.
steps: Drop or choose a file in Attachments.
Switch to Comments while the upload is in progress.
items.expected: The same pending progress appears below the latest conversation item, then the completed file remains visible in Comments and as one Attachments library item.
items.evidence: User-authorized waiver on 2026-07-16; item not run.
items.notes: Browser acceptance was skipped for the requested direct dev/dave merge.
items.waiver: The user explicitly waived testing and requested a direct merge to dev/dave. This item was not run and is not claimed as a pass.

items.title: Failed upload stays visibly failed
items.precondition: A file or network condition that makes the upload endpoint reject the request is available.
steps: Start the failing upload from either tab.
Observe Comments and Attachments after failure.
items.expected: One failed row with its error stays visible in both surfaces; it is not shown as completed and the attachment count does not increase.
items.evidence: User-authorized waiver on 2026-07-16; item not run.
items.notes: Browser acceptance was skipped for the requested direct dev/dave merge.
items.waiver: The user explicitly waived testing and requested a direct merge to dev/dave. This item was not run and is not claimed as a pass.

items.title: Attachment actions stay synchronized
items.precondition: The task has an attachment the current user is allowed to delete.
steps: Preview and download the attachment from Comments.
Delete the attachment from Comments and confirm the dialog.
items.expected: Preview and download work; server-authorized delete removes the file from both tabs and decrements only the attachment count.
items.evidence: User-authorized waiver on 2026-07-16; item not run.
items.notes: Browser acceptance was skipped for the requested direct dev/dave merge.
items.waiver: The user explicitly waived testing and requested a direct merge to dev/dave. This item was not run and is not claimed as a pass.
